title: Totem Curse
description: Adds an effect that disables totem of undying after its activation.
body:
# Totem Curse

The Totem Curse Mod is an immersive Minecraft addition that introduces a captivating gameplay element. It adds an effect that temporarily disables Totem of Undying after its activation. 

## Config

By default, this curse lasts for 30 seconds. However, singleplayers/server admins, can configure its duration with the config avaliable at "config/TotemCooldown"
